pi_items.source: Checked export_result.sh which sets OUTPUT_PATH='/home/ga/DICOM/exports/labeled_vessel.png' and verifier.py which checks that exact path.
Checked verifier.py which uses this label in the VLM prompt to grade the agent.
Checked verifier.py which ensures the file size is >= 5000 bytes.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a real X-Ray Angiography (XA) sample (0002.DCM) from Rubo Medical. The agent must draw a distance measurement line, assign it the label 'Aortic Root' strictly via the measurement properties dialog, and export the result to /home/ga/DICOM/exports/labeled_vessel.png, creating a file larger than 5000 bytes.
